banner.readonly: Read-only archive · every claim is labeled CONFIRMED or ALLEGATION · no court has found any party liable.
switcher.label: Language
footer.derived: Content derived from the canonical Markdown; this site renders that record read-only and does not modify the source.
home.tagline: A father and his son spent 25 years building a LEGO Star Wars collection — roughly 780 sets. Then, the family says, the shop they hired to sell it never gave it back. The fight to recover it spiraled into a viral investigation, two arrests, a police scandal, and a 13-count lawsuit across two states. A neutral, fully sourced archive — every claim labeled Confirmed or Allegation.
home.card.timeline: Chronological events, filterable by Confirmed / Allegation.
home.card.parties: Each party's public role in the dispute.
home.card.lawsuit: Utah 4th District case, 13 causes of action.
timeline.intro: Chronological record, 2023–2026. Filter by status or search. Each entry is labeled as documented (**Confirmed**), a contested contention (**Allegation**), or otherwise **Reported**.
timeline.sortAriaAsc: Sorted oldest first; click to show newest first
timeline.sortAriaDesc: Sorted newest first; click to show oldest first
parties.intro: Each person and entity is described **only by their public role** in the dispute and their publicly reported statements. No private personal information is included.
media.intro: Links are cataloged, **not re-hosted** (copyright). Verify channel ownership and bylines at the source before relying on any item. To fetch local copies, see the {download}.
media.primaryRecordsCallout: Looking for **primary records** — court filings, public records, official statements, and the full video index? See the {sources} compiled from the r/RecklessBen megathreads (defense-aligned; verify before relying).
lawsuit.docsLink: How to obtain the primary court filings
graph.imagery: Imagery linked from public sources; private individuals shown as initials only. See {disclaimer}.
